ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "x_spring" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cell in the spring layout */,
  "y_spring" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cell in the spring layout */,
  "potential" REAL /* Potential energy of the cell */,
  "pr_er" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the ER (Endoplasmic Reticulum) state */,
  "pr_gr" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the GR (Growth) state */,
  "pr_ly" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the LY (Lymphocyte) state */,
  "pr_dc" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the DC (Dendritic Cell) state */,
  "pr_mk" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the MK (Megakaryocyte) state */,
  "pr_mo" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the MO (Monocyte) state */,
  "pr_ba" REAL /* Probability of the cell being in the BA (Basophil) state */,
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell line the cell belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment the cell is part of */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the current state of the cell */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell data was recorded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_line ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES cell_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cells_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell line used in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_line ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions and access levels of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell state */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the cell state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_line" (
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the cell line is derived from */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the cell line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_cells" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment */,
  "cell_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell */,
  "cell_line_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell line */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* ID of the current state of the cell */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell data was recorded */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the cell in the context of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_cells_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_line ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_cells_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES cell_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions and access levels of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
